name: luckyducky-next
description: Lucky Ducky 重构样板房（平行仓，禁部署）——npm workspaces 一仓四包：shared/cloud/miniapp/admin

scripts.dev:h5: npm run build:shared && npm run dev:h5 -w luckyducky-miniapp
scripts.dev:mp-weixin: npm run build:shared && npm run dev:mp-weixin -w luckyducky-miniapp
scripts.dev:app: npm run build:shared && npm run dev:app -w luckyducky-miniapp
scripts.build:h5: npm run build:shared && npm run build:h5 -w luckyducky-miniapp
scripts.build:mp-weixin: npm run build:shared && npm run build:mp-weixin -w luckyducky-miniapp
scripts.build:app: npm run build:shared && npm run build:app -w luckyducky-miniapp
scripts.check: npm run check:conventions && npm run check:structure && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
